# Beudox HR Portal - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React-based single-page application (SPA) built with TypeScript, serving as a comprehensive HR management portal. The application follows a component-based architecture with feature-organized directories.

### Frontend Architecture
- **Framework**: React 18 with functional components and hooks
- **Language**: TypeScript for type safety
- **Build System**: Vite for fast development and optimized production builds
- **Routing**: React Router for client-side navigation
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with a design system based on CSS custom properties
- **UI Library**: shadcn/ui components built on Radix UI primitives

### Backend Integration
- **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL) with real-time capabilities
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth with role-based access control
- **API**: Direct Supabase client integration with TypeScript types
- **File Storage**: Supabase Storage for avatars and documents

## Key Components and Features

### Core Layout Components
- `AppLayout`: Main application layout with sidebar navigation
- `AppSidebar`: Navigation sidebar with role-based menu items
- `TopBar`: Header with user menu, notifications, and search
- `NotificationBell`: Real-time notification system

### Feature Modules

#### Attendance Management
- `AttendanceSummary`: Comprehensive attendance analytics with metrics, overtime tracking, and anomaly detection
- `AttendanceUploadFlow`: Bulk attendance data import and processing
- `MissingEntryModal`: Handle incomplete attendance records

#### Employee Profiles
- Profile tabs for Attendance, Documents, Leave, Payroll, Salary History, and Reviews
- `PendingIncrementCard`: Salary increment proposals
- `ProposeIncrementModal`: Increment request workflow
- `ReviewScheduleSection`: Performance review scheduling

#### Leave Management
- `AllRequestsTab`: Manager view of all leave requests
- `ApplyLeaveModal`: Employee leave application
- `LeaveBalancesTab`: Personal leave balance tracking
- `MyRequestsTab`: Individual request history

#### Payroll Processing
- `PayrollDetailSheet`: Detailed payroll calculations
- `PayrollSummary`: Payroll overview and reporting

#### Settings and Configuration
- Company settings, departments, roles, leave types, expense categories
- `EvaluationParametersTab`: Performance evaluation criteria
- `LoginLogsTab`: Security audit logs

### Utility Components
- `BeudoxLogo`: Responsive logo component with variants
- `NavLink`: Enhanced React Router NavLink with active state styling
- `SearchableEmployeeSelect`: Employee search and selection component
- `MandatoryPasswordChange`: Secure password reset modal
- `RichTextEditor`: WYSIWYG editor for policies and documents

## Data Flow and Business Logic

### Authentication Flow
1. Users authenticate via Supabase Auth
2. New users are forced to change temporary passwords
3. JWT tokens manage session state
4. Role-based permissions control feature access

### Attendance Processing
- Records include check-in/out times, working hours, overtime
- Automatic calculation of late arrivals and absences
- Holiday and weekend overtime tracking
- Anomaly detection for incomplete records

### Leave Management
- Balance tracking across multiple leave types
- Approval workflows with notifications
- Calendar integration for date calculations
- Automatic balance updates

### Payroll Generation
- Integration with attendance data for overtime calculations
- Salary history and increment tracking
- PDF generation for payroll sheets

## Database Schema Highlights

### Core Tables
- `employees`: User profiles with company associations
- `attendance_records`: Time tracking data
- `leave_requests`: Leave application and approval data
- `payroll_records`: Salary and payment information
- `projects`: Project management and assignments
- `public_holidays`: Company holiday calendar

### Relationships
- Employees belong to companies with role-based access
- Attendance and leave records link to employees
- Projects have many-to-many relationships with employees
- Settings tables (departments, roles, etc.) are company-scoped

## Key Files and Entry Points

- `src/main.tsx`: Application entry point, renders root component
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Main dashboard page
- `src/App.tsx`: Root component with routing setup
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication state management

## Development and Build Configuration

- **TypeScript**: Strict configuration in `tsconfig.json`
- **ESLint**: Code quality enforcement
- **Vite**: Development server and build optimization
- **Tailwind**: Utility-first CSS with custom design tokens
- **Testing**: Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E

## Security Considerations

- Row Level Security (RLS) policies in Supabase
- Role-based access control throughout the application
- Secure password policies and temporary password handling
- Audit logging for sensitive operations
- Input validation and sanitization

## Performance Optimizations

- Lazy loading of components and routes
- Efficient data fetching with Supabase queries
- Memoized calculations for attendance metrics
- Optimized re-renders with React hooks
- CDN-ready asset optimization
